recommendations.title: Hell Fest
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night at a horror theme park, a costumed killer begins slaying innocent patrons who believe that it's all part of the festivities.

recommendations.title: The Jack in the Box
recommendations.overview: When a vintage Jack-in-the-box is un-earthed and opened, it's new owners soon have reason to believe the creepy clown doll within has a life of its own.

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: The Conference
recommendations.overview: A ragtag group of public sector employees battle not only their own discord but also a bloodthirsty killer during a seemingly innocuous retreat.

recommendations.title: The Bunny Game
recommendations.overview: A prostitute looking for her next meal hitches a ride with a trucker that leaves her praying for her next breath.

recommendations.title: Feral
recommendations.overview: A wild animal attacks six medical students on a weekend hike in the woods. One by one, they become infected with a “feral disease,” turning them into rabid, bloodthirsty creatures, and the vacation becomes a nightmare as they fight to survive each ot

recommendations.title: The Funhouse
recommendations.overview: Rebellious teen Amy defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town. In tow are her boyfriend, Buzz, and their friends Liz  and Richie. Thinking it would be fun to spend the night in the campy "Funhouse" horror ride, the te

recommendations.title: The Court Jester
recommendations.overview: A hapless carnival performer masquerades as the court jester as part of a plot against a usurper who has overthrown the rightful king of England.

recommendations.title: Nocturne
recommendations.overview: Inside the halls of an elite arts academy, a timid music student begins to outshine her more accomplished and outgoing twin sister when she discovers a mysterious notebook belonging to a recently deceased classmate.

recommendations.title: Monster Man
recommendations.overview: Two guys and a female hitchhiker are terrorized by a monstrous looking man driving a giant monster truck.
